2603.21824.title: SteelDefectX: A Coarse-to-Fine Vision-Language Dataset and Benchmark for Generalizable Steel Surface Defect Detection
2603.21824.paper_summary: Steel surface defect detection is essential for ensuring product quality and reliability in modern manufacturing. Current methods often rely on basic image classification models trained on label-only datasets, which limits their interpretability and generalization. To address these challenges, we introduce SteelDefectX, a vision-language dataset containing 7,778 images across 25 defect categories, annotated with coarse-to-fine textual descriptions. At the coarse-grained level, the dataset provides class-level information, including defect categories, representative visual attributes, and associated industrial causes. At the fine-grained level, it captures sample-specific attributes, such as shape, size, depth, position, and contrast, enabling models to learn richer and more detailed defect representations. We further establish a benchmark comprising four tasks, vision-only classification, vision-language classification, few/zero-shot recognition, and zero-shot transfer, to evaluate model performance and generalization. Experiments with several baseline models demonstrate that coarse-to-fine textual annotations significantly improve interpretability, generalization, and transferability. We hope that SteelDefectX will serve as a valuable resource for advancing research on explainable, generalizable steel surface defect detection. The data will be publicly available on https://github.com/Zhaosxian/SteelDefectX.
2603.21824.paper_summary_zh: 鋼鐵表面缺陷檢測對於確保現代製造中的產品質量和可靠性至關重要。當前的方法通常依賴於僅在標籤數據集上訓練的基本圖像分類模型，這限制了它們的可解釋性和泛化能力。為了解決這些挑戰，我們推出了SteelDefectX，一個包含7,778張圖像的視覺-語言數據集，涵蓋25個缺陷類別，並附有從粗到細的文本描述。在粗粒度層面，該數據集提供類別級別的信息，包括缺陷類別、代表性視覺屬性和相關的工業原因。在細粒度層面，它捕捉特定樣本的屬性，如形狀、大小、深度、位置和對比度，使模型能夠學習更豐富和更詳細的缺陷表示。我們進一步建立了一個基準，包括四個任務：僅視覺分類、視覺-語言分類、少量/零樣本識別和零樣本轉移，以評估模型的性能和泛化能力。對幾個基線模型的實驗表明，粗到細的文本註釋顯著提高了可解釋性、泛化能力和可轉移性。我們希望SteelDefectX能成為推進可解釋、可泛化的鋼鐵表面缺陷檢測研究的寶貴資源。數據將在https://github.com/Zhaosxian/SteelDefectX上公開提供。
2603.21824.author: Shuxian Zhao et.al.
2603.21824.authors: Shuxian Zhao, Jie Gui, Baosheng Yu, Lu Dong, Zhipeng Gui
